summary.business_type: Local Service — Architectural drawing office (bouwkundig tekenbureau), Heerhugowaard NL
top_findings: No sitemap.xml (404) and internal navigation exists only in JavaScript — fragile page discovery
Zero structured data anywhere — biggest local-SEO miss
No Open Graph / Twitter Card tags on any page
No canonical tags on any page
~27 MB of unused oversized images in /img/ are published to production
quick_wins: Add LocalBusiness JSON-LD with NAP + geo
Add Open Graph + Twitter tags + OG image

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: lang=nl and viewport on all pages

findings.title: No sitemap.xml
findings.description: Returns 404; discovery relies on crawling JS-injected links.
findings.recommendation: Add sitemap.xml at repo root with all 6 URLs.

findings.title: Internal navigation injected by JavaScript only
findings.description: Empty <header>/<footer>; nav and all internal links written at runtime by js/site.js. Non-rendering crawlers (Bing, GPTBot, social scrapers) see orphan pages.
findings.recommendation: Bake header/footer markup into static HTML or add a <noscript> link block.

findings.title: No robots.txt
findings.description: Returns 404; cannot reference sitemap or set crawl rules.

findings.title: No CNAME file in repo
findings.description: Custom domain works via GH settings but binding can be lost on redeploy without a CNAME file.
findings.recommendation: Commit a CNAME file containing tekenbureauwinter.nl.

findings.title: No custom 404 page
findings.description: Generic GitHub Pages 404.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Clear value proposition and service descriptions

findings.title: Weak E-E-A-T / trust signals
findings.description: No reviews, testimonials, case studies, named author, or credentials; owner positioned as a student.
findings.recommendation: Add reviews/testimonials, real case studies, and credential/registration details.

findings.title: Brand-name inconsistency
findings.description: About page calls the business 'Winter details' twice instead of 'Tekenbureau Winter' (over-tekenbureau-winter.html:67,71).

findings.title: Spelling errors in core keywords
findings.description: 'Dakkappellen' and 'dakappel' on diensten.html (correct: Dakkapellen / dakkapel).
findings.recommendation: Fix spelling of key service terms.

findings.title: Thin pages and empty description
findings.description: pakketten/contact/projecten light on text; empty Vergunningsaanvraag description (pakketten.html:73).

findings.title: Email domain mismatch
findings.description: info@tekenbureauwinter.com vs .nl brand.
findings.recommendation: Standardize on one domain across site and citations.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: One H1 per page with logical hierarchy

findings.title: No Open Graph / Twitter Card tags
findings.description: No og:* or twitter:* tags on any page; shared links render bare.
findings.recommendation: Add OG + Twitter tags and a 1200x630 OG image to all pages.

findings.title: No canonical tags
findings.description: No rel=canonical on any page.

findings.title: Local keywords underused in titles
findings.description: Only homepage uses 'Heerhugowaard'.

findings.title: No breadcrumbs
findings.description: No breadcrumb navigation or schema.

findings.title: No structured data at all
findings.description: Zero JSON-LD across the site. Largest opportunity for a local business.
findings.recommendation: Add LocalBusiness/ProfessionalService, Service+Offer, FAQPage, and BreadcrumbList schema (templates in findings/schema.md).

categories.name: Performance (CWV, est.)
what_works: scripts at end of body, font preconnect + display=swap

findings.title: Three font families with many weights
findings.description: Poppins+Inter+Space Mono loaded together.

findings.title: GSAP + ScrollTrigger on every page (~70KB)
findings.description: Used only for scroll reveals.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Clear NAP and geo data in footer

findings.title: No structured data lowers AI citability
findings.description: AI search relies on schema + entity clarity.

findings.title: JS-only nav blocks AI crawlers
findings.description: GPTBot/PerplexityBot/ClaudeBot largely don't run JS; pages look orphaned.
findings.recommendation: Serve internal links in static HTML.

findings.title: No FAQ / direct-answer content
findings.description: No Q&A content for AI engines to cite.
findings.recommendation: Add an FAQ section + FAQPage schema.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Descriptive alt text on all images

findings.title: ~27 MB of unused images published
findings.description: /img/ folder (Vergunningsaanvraag.jpg 16MB, Detaillering.jpg 8.5MB, etc.) not referenced by any page but deployed via path: . in deploy.yml.

findings.title: No next-gen image formats
findings.description: All content images JPG/PNG.

findings.title: No apple-touch-icon or OG image
findings.description: Only SVG favicon present.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Render nav/footer in static HTML (or noscript)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add Open Graph + Twitter tags + OG image
Fix content errors (brand name, spelling, empty description)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Turn gallery into real case studies

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Connect Google Search Console + submit sitemap
